text:
- Update audio/libmusicbrainz to version 2.1.5
- Update audio/py-musicbrainz to version 2.1.5

How-To-Repeat: - apply attached diffs
- audio/libmusicbrainz needs to be updated first
- audio/py-musicbrainz requires files from audio/libmusicbrainz therefore they
  need to be committed together so that py-musicbrainz does not break
